nasb.text: For the famine has been in the land these two years, and there are still five years in which there will be neither plowing nor harvesting.

esv.text: For the famine has been in the land these two years, and there are yet five years in which there will be neither plowing nor harvest.

cnv.text: 現在這地的饑荒已經有兩年了，還有五年不能耕種，也沒有收成。

ccb.text: 地上的饥荒已经两年了，我们还有五年不能种、不能收。

csbs.text: 如今，这地已经有两年的饥荒，还会有五年既没有耕种，也没有收成。
